call_pattern: High-pitched thin 'seet' calls, repeated 3-7 times rapidly
behavioral_meaning: Aerial predator detected — hawk, owl, or large raptor overhead. Maximum urgency freeze response.
behavioral_response: Entire flock freezes instantly. Birds seek dense cover. Silence follows.
translation_template: FREEZE! There's a hawk directly overhead. Don't move a muscle.

intensity_modifiers.high: FREEZE! They're RIGHT above us — hawk circling overhead! Nobody move!
intensity_modifiers.medium: Careful — I think I spotted a hawk up there. Stay alert and find cover.
intensity_modifiers.low: Something moved in the sky. Could be a predator. Watch the sky.

source: Morse 1980; Robinson 1990; Cornell Lab of Ornithology

call_pattern: Sharp 'peek' or 'tut' calls, loud and repetitive
behavioral_meaning: Ground predator detected — cat, snake, or mammalian threat approaching.
behavioral_response: Birds mob the predator. Dive-bombing behavior. Loud alarm chorus.
translation_template: There's something on the ground — everyone come look! We need to drive it away!

intensity_modifiers.high: CAT! CAT on the ground! Everyone get over here — we're mobbing it NOW!
intensity_modifiers.medium: Something's moving down there. Come check this out — could be a threat.
intensity_modifiers.low: I noticed something on the ground. Keeping an eye on it.

call_pattern: Loud, melodious 'cheerily cheer-up cheerio' song from exposed perch
behavioral_meaning: Male defending breeding territory. Broadcasting ownership and fitness.
behavioral_response: Rival males retreat or counter-sing from their own territories.
translation_template: This is MY territory. I've been here all season. Listen to how strong I sing — you don't want to challenge me.

intensity_modifiers.high: This is MY territory and I will FIGHT for it! I've been singing here all season. Back off NOW!
intensity_modifiers.medium: I'm singing from my territory. This area is claimed. Please find somewhere else.
intensity_modifiers.low: Just singing my morning song. Letting everyone know I'm here.

call_pattern: Soft 'tuk tuk' or low whistles between flock members
behavioral_meaning: Maintaining flock cohesion. 'I'm here, where are you?' social check-in.
behavioral_response: Nearby birds respond with similar soft calls. Flock stays loosely together.
translation_template: I'm over here — just checking in. Everyone okay? Stay close.

intensity_modifiers.high: Where IS everyone? I can't see any of you! Please respond!
intensity_modifiers.medium: Hey, I'm over here by the bush. Anyone nearby?
intensity_modifiers.low: Just saying hi. All good here.

source: Cornell Lab of Ornithology; Ficken & Popp 1996

behavioral_meaning: Territorial defense. Warning rival crows or other threats to leave the area.
behavioral_response: Rival crows retreat or engage in counter-calling contest.
translation_template: This is my territory. I've been here for years and I am not leaving. You need to go.

intensity_modifiers.high: GET OUT! This is MY area! I will bring my entire family to drive you out if you don't leave RIGHT NOW!
intensity_modifiers.medium: Hey — this area is taken. I suggest you move along before things get serious.
intensity_modifiers.low: Just letting everyone know I'm around. This is my patch.

call_pattern: Rapid, urgent 'caw' bursts with mobbing calls
behavioral_meaning: Predator detected — owl or hawk. Rallying flock for mobbing behavior.
behavioral_response: Crows gather from wide area. Aggressive mobbing of predator.
translation_template: HAWK! Everyone get over here NOW! We're driving this thing out of our territory!

intensity_modifiers.high: OWL! I found an OWL! Every crow within earshot — GET HERE NOW! We're mobbing!
intensity_modifiers.medium: Predator spotted — looks like a hawk. Calling for backup.
intensity_modifiers.low: I see something suspicious up there. Keep your eyes open.

call_pattern: Soft, modulated 'caw' with lower pitch, often repeated 2-3 times
behavioral_meaning: Food discovery. Alerting family group to food source.
behavioral_response: Family members approach. Coordinated feeding begins.
translation_template: Found food over here! Come check this out — there's plenty for everyone.

intensity_modifiers.high: JACKPOT! Huge food source here! Everyone come quick before something else finds it!
intensity_modifiers.medium: Hey family — found some food over here. Come on over.
intensity_modifiers.low: Picked up a snack. Not much, but it's something.

behavioral_meaning: Aerial predator warning. Call frequency makes it hard for predator to locate caller.
behavioral_response: All nearby birds freeze. No mobbing — pure freeze response.
translation_template: Don't move! Predator above! Stay perfectly still!

intensity_modifiers.high: FREEZE RIGHT NOW! Sparrowhawk directly overhead! Nobody breathe!
intensity_modifiers.medium: Something flying above. Stay still until I give the all clear.
intensity_modifiers.low: Might have seen something overhead. Stay cautious.

call_pattern: Complex song with repeated phrases, 3-6 repetitions each, from high perch
behavioral_meaning: Aggressive territory defense. Repertoire size signals fitness and experience.
behavioral_response: Rival males retreat. Females assess male quality by song complexity.
translation_template: Listen to how many songs I know! This territory is mine. I've lived here long enough to learn ALL these songs.

intensity_modifiers.high: I know MORE songs than you EVER will! This is MY territory and I'll sing ALL NIGHT to prove it!
intensity_modifiers.medium: Here's another song from my repertoire. I know dozens. This area is well-defended.
intensity_modifiers.low: Just practicing my songs. Keeping sharp.

call_pattern: Complex melodic song starting with 2-3 clear notes, then a trill
behavioral_meaning: Male advertising for mates. Song complexity indicates genetic fitness.
behavioral_response: Females approach to assess. Rival males counter-sing.
translation_template: I am here. I am strong. Listen to how beautifully I can sing. Come find me.

intensity_modifiers.high: I am the BEST singer in this area! Ladies, come hear what I can do! I'll sing all day!
intensity_modifiers.medium: Singing my best song. Looking for someone special to share this territory with.
intensity_modifiers.low: Practicing my tune. Just warming up.
